title: Monsoon Mascarpone Delight
description: A creamy, sweet dessert perfect for warm weather. This recipe combines the richness of mascarpone with the sweetness of monsoon delight.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the Mascarpone and Granulated Sugar until smooth.
Add the Vanilla Extract and whisk until combined.
In a separate bowl, whip the Heavy Cream until stiff peaks form.
Fold the whipped cream into the Mascarpone mixture until well combined.
Stir in the Monsoon Delight and Lemon Zest.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or a large baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional Lemon Zest if desired.
